name: mind-inbox
description: Mind Inbox monorepo root (tooling only — actual apps live under apps/*)

scripts.lint: npm run lint:bff && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:py && npm run lint:md
scripts.lint:py: uv run --directory apps/services/ai-agent ruff check .. && uv run --directory apps/services/ai-agent ruff format --check ..
scripts.format: prettier --write . && uv run --directory apps/services/ai-agent ruff format ..
